listening.title: Listening: Ordering at a restaurant
listening.transcript: Do you have any pasta? Yes, we have some pasta and some pizza. There isn't any seafood today.

listening.title: Listening: Weekly shopping plan
listening.transcript: We need a lot of vegetables this week. There is plenty of fruit at the market today. I only have a few onions at home.

questions.question: Onions at home: ___
questions.explanation: "I only have a few onions at home."
